ddls:
CREATE TABLE "sites" (
  "site_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each site */,
  "site_name" TEXT /* Name of the site */,
  "domain_id" TEXT /* Identifier for the domain or region the site belongs to */,
  "domain_name" TEXT /* Name of the domain or region */,
  "site_description" TEXT /* A brief description of the site */,
  "decimal_latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the site in decimal degrees */,
  "decimal_longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the site in decimal degrees */,
  "geodetic_datum" TEXT /* Geodetic datum used for coordinates */,
  "coordinate_uncertainty" REAL /* Uncertainty in the coordinate measurement in meters */,
  "elevation" REAL /* Elevation of the site in meters */,
  "site_area" REAL /* Area of the site in square meters */,
  "site_establishment_date" TEXT /* Date when the site was established */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("site_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "plots" (
  "plot_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each plot */,
  "site_id" TEXT /* Reference to the site where the plot is located */,
  "plot_name" TEXT /* Name of the plot */,
  "plot_number" INTEGER /* Number of the plot within the site */,
  "plot_description" TEXT /* A brief description of the plot */,
  "plot_area" REAL /* Area of the plot in square meters */,
  "plot_establishment_date" TEXT /* Date when the plot was established */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("plot_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_plots_site_id FOREIGN KEY ("site_id") REFERENCES sites ("site_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "subplots" (
  "subplot_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each subplot */,
  "plot_id" TEXT /* Reference to the plot where the subplot is located */,
  "subplot_number" INTEGER /* Number of the subplot within the plot */,
  "collect_date" TEXT /* Date the data was collected */,
  "sampling_impractical" TEXT /* Indication if sampling was impractical */,
  "remarks" TEXT /* Remarks or observations made during sampling */,
  "measured_by" TEXT /* Email of the person who measured the data */,
  "recorded_by" TEXT /* Email of the person who recorded the data */,
  "publication_date" TEXT /* Date the data was published */,
  "release" TEXT /* Release version of the data */,
  "subplot_description" TEXT /* A brief description of the subplot */,
  "subplot_area" REAL /* Area of the subplot in square meters */,
  "subplot_establishment_date" TEXT /* Date when the subplot was established */,
  "sampling_protocol_id" TEXT /* Reference to the sampling protocol used for the subplot */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("subplot_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_subplots_sampling_protocol_id FOREIGN KEY ("sampling_protocol_id") REFERENCES sampling_protocols ("protocol_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_subplots_plot_id FOREIGN KEY ("plot_id") REFERENCES plots ("plot_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "samples" (
  "sample_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each sample */,
  "subplot_id" TEXT /* Reference to the subplot where the sample was collected */,
  "core_id" TEXT /* Identifier for the core or sample location */,
  "wst_10cm_dist" REAL /* Distance from the west 10cm marker */,
  "wst_1cm_dist" REAL /* Distance from the west 1cm marker */,
  "bare_ground" INTEGER /* Presence of bare ground (0 for no, 1 for yes) */,
  "litter_depth" INTEGER /* Depth of litter in centimeters */,
  "root_sampling_possible" TEXT /* Indication if root sampling was possible */,
  "root_sampling_method" TEXT /* Method used for root sampling */,
  "root_sample_area" REAL /* Area of the root sample in square meters */,
  "root_sample_depth" INTEGER /* Depth of the root sample in centimeters */,
  "core_diameter" REAL /* Diameter of the core in centimeters */,
  "monolith_length" REAL /* Length of the monolith in centimeters */,
  "monolith_width" REAL /* Width of the monolith in centimeters */,
  "sample_description" TEXT /* A brief description of the sample */,
  "sample_collection_method" TEXT /* Method used to collect the sample */,
  "sample_processing_date" TEXT /* Date when the sample was processed */,
  "sample_storage_conditions" TEXT /* Conditions under which the sample is stored */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sample_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_samples_subplot_id FOREIGN KEY ("subplot_id") REFERENCES subplots ("subplot_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sampling_protocols" (
  "protocol_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each sampling protocol */,
  "protocol_version" TEXT /* Version of the sampling protocol */,
  "protocol_name" TEXT /* Name of the sampling protocol */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the sampling protocol */,
  "protocol_document" TEXT /* Path to the document describing the protocol */,
  "protocol_effective_date" TEXT /* Date when the protocol became effective */,
  "protocol_expiration_date" TEXT /* Date when the protocol expires */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("protocol_id")
)
